title: rosa contracta
intro: Rosa contracta, also known as the downy rose, is a type of wild rose species found in various parts of the world. The medicinal properties of Rosa contracta lie in its leaves, stems, and flowers, which contain antioxidants, tannins, and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rosa contracta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Rosa contracta is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves to treat various ailments, including wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues.
